prep.coaching_theme: Clearing blockers so Alex can do his best work, without burning out
prep.opening_check_in: The recurring tasks delivery was the biggest thing on the sprint — how are you feeling now that it's over the line?

suggested_questions: What's the one thing that could still block sign-off today?
If you had to rate QA readiness 1-10 right now, what's the number?
What do you need from me to close this out by Wednesday?
agenda_items.manager_action_before: Review QA checklist and note any open P0 bugs before the meeting

agenda_items.topic: Design spec process: from complaint to concrete fix
suggested_questions: If you could change one step in how we hand off specs before sprint, what would it be?
What would 'good enough to start' look like as a minimum spec bar?
Are there other engineers who feel this way, or is it specific to your work stream?
agenda_items.manager_action_before: Prepare a draft: spec-ready checklist with 3 items that must be done before sprint planning

suggested_questions: How many hours a week are you currently spending with Sofia?
What would need to change for this to feel sustainable for the next 3 months?
How is mentoring Sofia connecting to your Staff Engineer goal — is it helping or taking time away from it?

prep.recognition_moment: The TaskList memoisation PR — that wasn't in the sprint but Alex spotted it and shipped it anyway. That's a Staff Engineer instinct: fixing the platform while delivering features. Call it out specifically.
manager_commitments_to_follow_up: Send spec-ready checklist draft to Alex by Thursday for feedback
Block sprint planning for 30 minutes the week before to review design specs with Alex and James
Check in with Alex individually mid-week — don't wait until Friday pulse
